mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (

SELECT A.rownum_ rowindx , B.TOTAL_COUNT totalCount , A.MNL_SERNO mnlSerno , A.MENU_CL_NM menuClNm , A.TCHGR_NM tchgrNm , A.MENU_EXPL menuExpl , A.ATCH_FILE_ID atchFileId , A.USE_YN useYn , A.REG_USER regUser , A.REG_USER_NM regUserNm , DATE_FORMAT(A.REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') regDate from ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SMM.REG_DATE ASC) AS rownum_ , SMM.MNL_SERNO , SMM.MENU_CL_NM , SMM.TCHGR_NM , SMM.MENU_EXPL , SMM.ATCH_FILE_ID , SMM.USE_YN , SMM.REG_USER , FN_S_USER_INFO(SMM.REG_USER,'') AS REG_USER_NM , SMM.REG_DATE FROM STB_SM_MNL_MNG SMM WHERE 1 = 1
AND SMM.MENU_CL_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND SMM.TCHGR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( SMM.MENU_CL_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR SMM.TCHGR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
) A JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_SM_MNL_MNG SMM WHERE 1 = 1
AND SMM.MENU_CL_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND SMM.TCHGR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( SMM.MENU_CL_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR SMM.TCHGR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
) B ON 1 = 1
